failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Solid formation due to quench or impurities

failure_modes.mitigation: Implement redundant temperature sensors and alarms

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=0.21884 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Test BPR valve with simulated impurities to ensure no blockage occurs
Simulate temperature control failure and verify system shutdown response
